description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of stone and wood panel exterior walls. The property is enclosed by a light-colored fence and features a covered carport on one side, as well as a small backyard with patio furniture and landscaping, including a tree and shrubs. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is recessed and features a simple door with a small overhang, accessible from a paved path. The house includes both private and communal outdoor spaces, such as a patio and a garden area. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on geometric lines and practical urban living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, stone and wood exterior, large windows, a covered carport, and enclosed yard with patio and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered carport, patio with outdoor furniture, and a section of the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport roof, side windows, and the continuation of the fence along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard garden, patio area, and additional windows, with a tree and landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden area, more windows, and the hedge along the property boundary.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, no steps, and a simple, modern design.
